title: oldenlandia tenuipes
intro: Oldenlandia tenuipes, also known as Thin-stemmed Oldenlandia or Thin-stemmed Blumea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia tenuipes include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Oldenlandia tenuipes can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
